title: Measures of stress
paperName: Paper 3 - Specialist Options: Approaches, Issues and Debates
summary: 9990 Health — self-report scales, physiological indicators, and stress assessment methods.
learningObjectives: Outline self-report measures: PSS, SRRS, hassles scales.
Explain physiological measures: cortisol, heart rate, GSR.
Evaluate validity of subjective vs objective stress measures.
Assess ethical issues in stress induction research.

simpleExplanation.title: Measuring the pressure
simpleExplanation.summary: Stress can be measured by asking people how they feel, or by tracking body responses like cortisol and heart rate — each captures different aspects.
